message:
fix(test): run squash jitter tests from temp dir to avoid workspace lookup succeeding (gt-emna)

TestSquashJitterZeroDuration and TestSquashJitterContextCancellation expected
workspace errors but got nil because they ran inside the actual gastown worktree.
Chdir to a temp directory so workspace.FindFromCwd() fails as intended.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
